briefdescription.para: How page scale is derived from viewport size versus an explicit zoom factor.
Page layout policy (single vs multi); scene currently always stacks pages vertically.
Constructs the PDF graphics view, scene, and scroll-bar current-page wiring.
Attaches a PDF document, connects status signals, and rebuilds the scene.

parameterdescription.para: Document to render, or nullptr to clear the view.

briefdescription.para: Returns the document currently bound to this view.

simplesect.para: Pointer to QPdfDocument, or nullptr if none.

briefdescription.para: Sets the search model whose rows define highlight rectangles on pages.

parameterdescription.para: Model from QPdfSearchModel, or nullptr to clear highlights.

briefdescription.para: Returns the active search model.

simplesect.para: Pointer to QPdfSearchModel, or nullptr if none.

briefdescription.para: Stores the page layout mode for API compatibility (layout is vertical stack).
Returns the stored page layout mode.

simplesect.para: Current PageMode value.

briefdescription.para: Sets zoom mode, scrollbar policy, and rebuilds layout when fit sizing changes.

parameterdescription.para: Custom, fit-to-width, or fit-in-view zoom behavior.

briefdescription.para: Returns the active zoom mode.

simplesect.para: Current ZoomMode value.

briefdescription.para: Sets the custom zoom factor (only affects layout when mode is Custom).

parameterdescription.para: Scale factor; values below an internal minimum are clamped.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current custom zoom factor.

simplesect.para: Stored zoom factor used when mode is Custom.

briefdescription.para: Vertical gap between stacked pages in scene coordinates (pixels).

simplesect.para: Page spacing in pixels.

briefdescription.para: 0-based index of the page whose vertical center is nearest the viewport center.

simplesect.para: Current page index.

briefdescription.para: Scrolls so page and location are visible; optionally applies zoom in Custom mode.

parameterdescription.para: PDF-space point on that page (top-left if default).
If greater than 0 and zoom mode is Custom, passed to setZoomFactor(); otherwise ignored.

briefdescription.para: Index of the search result drawn with the “current” highlight color.

simplesect.para: 0-based model row, or -1 if none / invalid model.

briefdescription.para: Highlights result index and emits currentSearchResultIndexChanged when it changes.

parameterdescription.para: 0-based QPdfSearchModel row, or -1 to clear the active highlight.

briefdescription.para: Copies trimmed text from the multi-page drag selection to the system clipboard.

simplesect.para: true if non-empty text was placed on the clipboard; otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Whether the user has a latched text selection after a completed drag.

simplesect.para: true if copySelectionToClipboard() would return text.

briefdescription.para: Emitted when the page nearest the viewport vertical center changes.
Emitted when the highlighted search-result index changes.

parameterdescription.para: New 0-based search model row, or -1 when cleared.

briefdescription.para: Relayouts rasterized pages when fit modes depend on viewport size.
In fit modes, scrolls vertically only and pins horizontal offset; may clear selection.

parameterdescription.para: Requested horizontal scroll delta (often suppressed in fit modes).

briefdescription.para: Forwards the wheel event and clears stale selection when not actively dragging.
Starts a left-button text drag at the PDF coordinates under the cursor.
Updates the selection end point and auto-scrolls near viewport edges while dragging.
Ends text selection on left-button release and recomputes highlight state.
Clears the scene and internal page/search/selection item lists.
Rasterizes every document page into the scene according to zoom mode.
Rebuilds search-match rectangles from m_searchModel and m_currentSearchResultIndex.
Rebuilds blue selection polygons from anchor/caret PDF geometry.
Maps a PDF-space rectangle on one page into scene coordinates.

parameterdescription.para: Rectangle in PDF point space for that page.

simplesect.para: Corresponding scene rectangle, or null if page is out of range.

briefdescription.para: Maps a PDF-space point on one page into scene coordinates.

simplesect.para: Scene coordinates, or (0,0) if page is out of range.

briefdescription.para: Maps a scene point into PDF-space for a known page.

simplesect.para: PDF-space point before clamping to the page box.

briefdescription.para: Resolves a scene position to a page index and clamped PDF coordinates.

parameterdescription.para: Point in scene coordinates (e.g. from mapToScene).
Receives PDF coordinates clamped to the page media box.

simplesect.para: true if a page could be resolved; false if arguments are null or no pages exist.

briefdescription.para: Clamps a PDF-space point to the page’s width and height in points.

simplesect.para: Clamped point, or (0,0) if page is out of range.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the selection anchor precedes the caret in document order.

simplesect.para: true if anchor is before caret using character indices or geometric fallback.

briefdescription.para: Clears drag/selection state and removes selection highlight items.
Updates the caret endpoint during a drag and refreshes selection highlights.

parameterdescription.para: PDF-space point on that page (clamped internally).

briefdescription.para: Returns whether any page in the anchor–caret span has non-empty trimmed selection text.

simplesect.para: true if at least one QPdfSelection in the span has visible text.

briefdescription.para: Recomputes m_currentPage from viewport geometry and emits currentPageChanged if needed.

memberdef.argsstring: (int page, bool isStartPage, bool isEndPage, const QPointF &startPoint, const QPointF &endPoint) const
memberdef.name: pdfRangeForPageInSelection

briefdescription.para: Builds the QPdfSelection slice for one page within a multi-page drag range.

detaileddescription.para: QPdfSelection is per-page; this maps logical anchor/caret across pages to per-page ranges.

parameterdescription.para: true if this page contains the range start point.
true if this page contains the range end point.
PDF-space start of the overall drag (on the start page).
PDF-space end of the overall drag (on the end page).

simplesect.para: QPdfSelection for page; may be empty if geometry does not intersect text.

briefdescription.para: Fills m_selDoc* from anchor/caret character indices for index-based spans.
Probes QPdfDocument::getSelection to find a stable start character index near pdfPt.

simplesect.para: Start character index, or -1 if none found.

briefdescription.para: Probes getSelection to find an inclusive end character index near pdfPt.

simplesect.para: Inclusive end character index, or -1 if none found.

briefdescription.para: Compares anchor and caret using stored character indices on the same or different pages.

simplesect.para: true if anchor precedes caret in (page, character) order.
